component.name: Omikuji
component.summary: Qt/QML based game launcher for Linux

description.p: A Qt/QML based games/apps launcher for Linux. Built 'cause I couldn't bear having 3 different launchers for just games.

ul.li: Added community scripts
Fixed super blurry zoom
Added Env-marker to properly track multiple running games
Added Wine command prompt along the other winetools
Added run wine commands dialog along other winetools
Added custom template literals for input fields
Added icons-only collapsable navbar
Added 3-mode (Normal, Fit, Frameless) game cards style
Added esizable modals and dialogs
Added maximizable modals/dialogs size on near-full window size
Added customizable font sizes with its modal
Added move envs/dlls sets to "Presets" tab in settings
Added Epic and GOG games installations dialogs expandable details (plot and system requiremenst)
Kuro games now use krpdiff to update.
Fix winetricks not opening by not inheriting blank DISPLAY env (#51)
Fix modals blur on fractional coords + dropdown scroll wheel leakthrough
downloads page items overhaul + shm leak on cancel (GOGDL/Legendary)
Move value on top of the sliders
Move to the left the theme colors value
Refine spinboxes
add filled svgs with filled toggle and rework ofudas, steam and gog svgs
Refine toasts
Add hide functionality for main library cards
Port settingd and downloads bridges onto kushi codegen
Add kushi crate dep
Data structure migration + migration modal
UI polish (smaller buttons, headers action buttons, log windows refinement, logs custom colors regex)
nvapi injection following source kind
Main library cards drag and drop with custom order.
Pre-launch scripts now executing before resolving the executable.
Main library cards A-Z/Z-A sorting
M3Dropdown widget polish
Env sets for flatpak/native/steam games.
GOG uninstall button
Various minor fixes
Ofuda system (prefix manager)
Prefix prep modal
Shared scroll between fixed in modals
Lazy runtime tools fetch (Only umu will be fetched on boot)
Added env/dll sets.
VKD3D toggle now overrides d3d12core too.
Fix GOG and Epic Games login page (+ DRY)
"Open with Omikuji" picker for .exe files.
Theme falls back to its own palette when the system color scheme is unknown.
RPM packaging CI.
Added a System Info section in About with a one-click copyable hardware/OS dump for bug reports.
The per-game GPU selector is now op.
Reworked the Components settings tab and version manager onto the new UI.
Now games symlink on run their icon in ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/256x256/apps/
Added a create steam shortcut button.
Fixed cli target resolution.
Flatpak build now doesn't hide various options from permissions lock, just warn about it.
Discord's RPC now shows the game name as the activity title.
HoYoverse updates no longer fail when a patch's source file is missing (e.g. game-managed cutscenes); the file is skipped instead.
Added a Repair action (right-click) for HoYoverse games to refetch missing or incomplete files.
Parallelized the update patch phase for noticeably faster updates.
Version metadata sync across Cargo and About tab.
AppImage and Flatpak release pipelines.
Discord Rich Presence integration.
System tray icon.
Font family picker and per-token theme color customization.
Epic and GOG update detection with manual and automatic checks.
HoYo downloads with Sophon (fixes Genshin stuck at 5.5.0 and other various problems).
Gacha import flow with on-disk version detection across all supported titles.
PGR now uses the new proper CDN.
Runner picker grouped by Proton and Wine families.
Double-click to launch games (toggleable).
Default prefix path option in global defaults.
